title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X.  EMERGENCY INTERIM LOCAL

EXECUTIVE SUCCESSION

§1401.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Interim Local Executive Succession Act."

Acts 1963, No. 114, §1.
